description: Composition Cream shorts made of 100% cotton, has belt loops on the waistband with a zipper fly and button closure, two pockets on the front, two welt pockets with button closures at the back and stitch detailing Fit Regular fit; Regular rise Wash care Wash and dry separately Wash inside out in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade This pair of shorts from scullers is that perfect contour-friendly pair you have been looking for. Designed for off-duty wear and crafted from quality cotton fabric, this piece makes for a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Wear it on a casual day out or when roughing it out in the great outdoors. Team it with funky t-shirts and casual shoes. Model statistics The product is size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
